form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 7 at this track on March 25 over 2100m, 4.5 len behind Baduturu with 53kg at $15.05. Before that 7th of 15 at this track on February 18 over 1400m, 13 len behind Star Ahlas with 59kg at $9.45. Prepared to risk today.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran on from midfield and scored a big 4 len win at this track March 18 over 2000m defeating Nox Atra carrying 54kg at $22.70. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at this track on October 24 over 2100m, 4 len behind Eagle Khan carrying 52kg at $5.30. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 30-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 8 at Osmangazi All Weather on March 9 over 2100m, 73 len behind Alone Alone carrying 60kg at $15.75. form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at this track November 9 over 2000m, 5 len behind Modern Warrior carrying 59kg at $3.40. When resuming last campaign third of 7 at this track February 15 2025 over 2000m, 3 len behind Attalos carrying 55.5kg at $4.40. Expected to prove hard to beat.
